commands.review_summary:
The PR adds v4 device-auth signing for explicit node IDs, propagates a resolved node identity through gateway node pairing/registry/pending/invoke/event paths, persists `nodeIdSource`, and adds focused regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +287, Tests +841. Total +1128 across 30 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: current main sends `instanceId: nodeId` from the node host but gateway registry/pending paths resolve the node from the device id, while docs advertise the `--node-id` override. I did not run the CLI flow in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can fix the owner-mismatched metadata write and add a focused regression test; maintainer/security review should still happen afterward.
